benefits.description: Felt sharper and more ready to do intellectual work in the evening
Felt more energized and positive on the day they stopped taking it

side_effects.description: Felt wired before bed; wanted to stay up until 3-4am; doses above 1mg/day caused insomnia; lower doses caused interrupted sleep; worsening of monitored sleep quality on Oura ring
Increased appetite while on sema microdose

protocol_notes: Researched BPC 157, TB 500, MOTs-C, and NAD+ before trying pinealon. Used 20mg vial reconstituted with 2ml bac water; tried 5, 10, then 15 units in a 0.5ml syringe. Experimented with timing (evening, midmorning, upon waking) with no notable difference in effect. Monitors sleep with Oura ring. Plans to try lower doses (<1mg), and considers trying Epitalon and DSIP in the future.
